title: US DoJ releases missing interviews with woman who made claims against Donald Trump
summary_full: The Justice Department has released previously withheld FBI interview notes concerning a woman's accusations of sexual assault against President Trump and Jeffrey Epstein. These documents, initially misclassified as duplicates, detail multiple interviews from 2019 about assaults dating back to the 1980s. Their delayed release has drawn criticism regarding the handling of Epstein-related files.
